company_context: Airbyte | Open-Source Data Integration Platform | ELT Tool Agent Engine Public Beta is now live! Loading... The Data Infrastructure Layer for Your Agents Airbyte gives data teams and AI agents a single, governed integration layer to access, search and act on data across every system, at scale. Try it free Talk to sales No credit card required 30-day free trial One platform for pipelines and AI agents. Airbyte provides the data infrastructure layer for ELT and AI agents, built on the same open-source foundation. Use batch and CDC replication for analytics, or direct connectors and context store to power agent workflows. Agent Engine For powering AI agents and real-time systems It pairs real-time direct connectors for fetch and write operations with replicated data in a context store, delivering faster discovery and search across every system. Explore Agent Engine Data Replication Engine For analytics and data platforms It uses batch and CDC connectors to move data from operational systems into warehouses, lakes, and databases at scale. ‍ Explore Data Replication Trusted by the world's leading companies Immediate ROI and productivity gains for your data teams. "With our legacy framework, if one of the pipelines fails for one client, it will stop everything for the rest of our clients. But with Airbyte, things are run in parallel because of the platform’s distributed nature, which means that we can process multiple clients at the same time without impacting performance." Raman Singh, Tech Lead at Symend Learn more 75% reduction in sync times $ 900K in annual savings "The real ROI is in our ability to iterate quickly, especially at our increasing scale. At the end of the day, you want a tool like that to just work. We can forget about it and know that it's configured and it's connecting and it's working. That hands-free capability is a big appeal for the platform.” Sean Carver, Director of Data at Petvisor Learn more 20+ data sources integrated and growing +1 FTE engineer in productivity efficiency 85%+ reduction in data source integration time "Unlike Fivetran's credit-based system that created budget uncertainty, Airbyte's pricing model allows Kuda to forecast expenses accurately and avoid surprise bills." Mondor La Grange, Head of BI and Data Engineering Learn more 90% reduction in latency "What's different from Stitch Data or Informatica is the way that we can configure Airbyte connections and Airbyte entities through code. That's a huge plus to us as data engineers, because we are used to checking code and being able to manage changes from Github." Amy Zhao, Senior Manager of Data Engineering at Peloton Learn more 3 to 1 reduction in data integrations solutions for reduced TCO 1 week Shopify and Stripe integration with Airbyte "Airbyte allows us to stay flexible while scaling from hundred-million to billion-dollar enterprise clients." Franziska Ibscher, Product Manager at Drivepoint Learn more 75% of customers increased profitability 6.7% EBITDA

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data integration and analysis. I came across Airbyte and saw that you're using an open-source data integration platform. I'd love to explore how our solution can complement your existing infrastructure.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We've been testing Airbyte's ELT tool and Agent Engine. What makes you think your solution is a good fit for us, and how does it differ from what we're already using?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our solution provides a more comprehensive data processing capabilities, including real-time data ingestion and advanced analytics. We've seen significant ROI and productivity gains for our clients, especially in terms of reducing sync times and increasing scalability. For example, one of our clients saw a 75% reduction in sync times and $900K in annual savings.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but we've just started implementing Airbyte, and I'm not sure we're ready to add another tool to our stack. We're still in the process of evaluating its performance and scalability. Plus, I'm concerned about the cost – our budget for this quarter is already allocated, and I'm not sure we can fit in another expense.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about cost and integration. However, our solution is designed to be highly flexible and adaptable, and we offer a free trial period to test our solution with your existing infrastructure. We've also had success with companies in similar situations, where our solution has helped them to reduce costs and improve efficiency in the long run. Would you be open to discussing this further and exploring how our solution can address your specific pain points?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but to be honest, we're in the middle of a critical project deadline, and our team is fully allocated. I'm not sure we have the bandwidth to take on another evaluation or implementation right now. We're already dealing with some integration issues with Airbyte, and I don't want to add another variable to the mix.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand the timing might not be ideal, but I'd like to propose a potential solution that could help alleviate some of the integration issues you're experiencing with Airbyte. We've had success with companies in similar situations, where our solution has helped to streamline their data integration and analysis. Would you be open to a brief follow-up conversation in a few weeks to check in on your progress with Airbyte and see if our solution might be a better fit at that time?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alex, I appreciate your persistence, but I think we're going to have to pass on this for now. We're just too busy, and this isn't a priority for us at the moment. I appreciate the information, but I don't think we'll be moving forward with DeepData AI at this time.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's timing concerns and integration issues with Airbyte earlier in the conversation to potentially change the buyer's perception of the solution's value. Sentiment: Neutral
